name: Malaguetta Restaurante Vegano
address: Av. da Universidade, 2064, Benfica, Fortaleza - CE, Brazil
notes: First 100% vegan restaurant in Fortaleza (since 2012), founded by Ziane. Confirmed by Sabores da Cidade, Achou Gastronomia, Yelp, Tripadvisor.

name: TerrAna Restaurante Vegano
notes: 100% plant-based by chef Ana Mota. Specializes in PANCs (non-conventional edible plants), Brazilian + international vegan cuisine. Confirmed by O Povo, Sabores da Cidade, HappyCow.

name: Pachamama Cultural
address: Rua Barão do Rio Branco, 2734, José Bonifácio, Fortaleza - CE, Brazil
notes: 100% vegan with regional touch. Run by Karol Magalhães and Ariadna Mendes. Confirmed by Secretaria da Cultura CE, Diário do Nordeste. Note: open status sometimes irregular — admin to verify.

name: Veganices Empório Vegano
notes: 100% vegan grocery emporium — frozen meals, plant meats, cheeses, dairy alternatives. Listed on Veganizze.com.br as fully vegan.

name: GoVegan Delivery Fortaleza
notes: 100% vegan junk-food delivery — burgers, pizzas, esfihas, pasteis, bolos. Listed on Veganizze.com.br.
